description: Map-only twin-table overlay presets. Grid is drawn only inside map_roi, and center table gap is computed from physical dimensions.

project_config_sync.notes: Keep software/python/config/project_config.json grid.* in sync with the active hardware profile below.

map_roi.notes: Normalized [0,1] rectangle inside base map image. Tune these numbers to lock onto the actual campus-map area.

twin_layout.notes: Extra cm BETWEEN the two table outer frames, beyond the modular joint. Use 0 for flush abutment: joint width = one road g (hardware-spec half-road borders meet). Set >0 only if there is real empty space between desks.
